title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Bayer India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Bayer India
jsonLd.description:
Bayer India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Bayer India:
Bayer India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
